title: NOAA BlueTopo

instructions: Select tiles intersecting the CastingCompass study extent from the official BlueTopo access surface.
Preserve elevation, uncertainty, and quality bands together.
Record tile version, source survey identifier, resolution, and checksum before mosaicking.

resolution.type: variable by source survey and depth
resolution.quality_contract: Use the uncertainty band and raster attribute table rather than treating every output pixel as equally measured.

temporal_coverage: Continuously maintained compilation; tile provenance identifies contributing surveys
citation: NOAA Office of Coast Survey, BlueTopo. Record tile edition and access date.
limitations: Output pixel spacing and contributing source resolution vary spatially.
Interpolated cells must be distinguishable from measured cells during training.
The compilation is a coverage backbone; local USGS multibeam/backscatter products can preserve finer structure where available.
